description_long: This lamp features a bold, spherical red housing with concentric circular detailing on its front face, reminiscent of a modernist or industrial design. At the center of the front, a deep purple circular lens or diffuser is set, likely serving as the primary light-emitting area. The lamp is supported by a thick, rounded purple base with a notched opening, providing both stability and a striking color contrast. The rear and sides of the lamp are smooth and unadorned, with subtle panel lines suggesting access or assembly points. The overall form is compact and robust, with a focus on geometric simplicity and color blocking. Its design suggests it is intended as a statement piece for urban environments, possibly for accent or security lighting.
description: A bold, spherical red lamp with a central purple lens and a thick, rounded purple base, featuring modern geometric styling and strong color contrast.
description_view_0: Front view shows the red sphere with concentric circles and a prominent purple lens at the center, set atop a purple base.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the smooth curvature of the red housing and the notched purple base, with visible panel lines.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the unadorned red back of the sphere and the full circular form of the purple base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the symmetry of the design and the continuation of the panel lines.
